scripts.verify: node tools/verify-project-setup.mjs && node tools/verify-observability.mjs && node tools/verify-ci.mjs && node tools/verify-deployment.mjs && node tools/verify-hardening.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test --workspaces --if-present && npm run verify
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @hospital/shared && npm run build --workspace @hospital/api && npm run build --workspace @hospital/web
